title: Run authoritative interop workflow on Ubuntu
description: Execute the recovered interop workflow on GitHub-hosted Ubuntu 22.04 or an equivalent Linux runner after the one-file fail-closed change lands. No AWS is required.
acceptance_criteria: frame-parser interop runs 2/2 without skips; multinode and announce jobs pass; vector regeneration is no-op; Rust shared_vectors runs two tests; Zephyr link_crypto runs on native_sim/native/64 without continue-on-error; deliberately failed dependency makes Interop Status fail; actionlint passes; retain workflow URL/logs.
